nasb.text: who opposes and exalts himself above every so-called god or object of worship, so that he takes his seat in the temple of God, displaying himself as being God.

esv.text: who opposes and exalts himself against every so-called god or object of worship, so that he takes his seat in the temple of God, proclaiming himself to be God.

cnv.text: 他抵擋　神，抬舉自己，高過一切稱為神或受人敬拜的，甚至坐在　神的殿中，自稱為　神。

ccb.text: 他会抵挡主，高抬自己超过一切所谓的神明和人们崇拜的对象，甚至坐在上帝的殿中以上帝自居！

csbs.text: 他反对一切被称为神的，或受人敬拜的，他又高抬自己在这一切之上，甚至坐在神的圣所里宣称自己是神。
